markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy, publishing workflow, and technical issues.](https://fathom.video/share/gNQLwkdDszS3uiUyavq4KUQaZ9tgt-hW?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**First Article Approved:** The first article is approved for publishing under `/guides`. Cody will fast-track GrowthX's Webflow access to enable direct staging.](https://fathom.video/share/gNQLwkdDszS3uiUyavq4KUQaZ9tgt-hW?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
  - [**Competitor Strategy Defined:** Direct competitors are Alteryx/Informatica. BI tools (Tableau/Power BI) are partners, not targets, as they are used *with* Prophecy.](https://fathom.video/share/gNQLwkdDszS3uiUyavq4KUQaZ9tgt-hW?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
  - [**Content Goal → Shape the Narrative:** The core strategy is to publish content that shapes how LLMs understand the market, seeding Prophecy's framing into search results.](https://fathom.video/share/gNQLwkdDszS3uiUyavq4KUQaZ9tgt-hW?tab=summary&timestamp=1553.0)
  - [**Tech Debt:** Cody will address a critical issue of invalid pages in the sitemap that are not 404ing, which could harm SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/gNQLwkdDszS3uiUyavq4KUQaZ9tgt-hW?tab=summary&timestamp=1694.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Framing

  - [**Data Cleaning vs. Transformation:**](https://fathom.video/share/gNQLwkdDszS3uiUyavq4KUQaZ9tgt-hW?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
      - [**Framing:** Group "data cleaning" under the broader "data transformation" topic to avoid semantic debates with technical stakeholders (e.g., Raj).](https://fathom.video/share/gNQLwkdDszS3uiUyavq4KUQaZ9tgt-hW?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [**Prophecy's Angle:** Focus on later-stage, ad-hoc cleaning. This is where analysts get stuck and must send work back to engineering. Prophecy's agentic capabilities solve this by letting analysts self-serve.](https://fathom.video/share/gNQLwkdDszS3uiUyavq4KUQaZ9tgt-hW?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [**Competitor Landscape:**](https://fathom.video/share/gNQLwkdDszS3uiUyavq4KUQaZ9tgt-hW?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
      - [**Direct Competitors:** Alteryx, Informatica.](https://fathom.video/share/gNQLwkdDszS3uiUyavq4KUQaZ9tgt-hW?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)
      - [**Partners (not competitors):** Tableau, Power BI. These are tools customers use *with* Prophecy.](https://fathom.video/share/gNQLwkdDszS3uiUyavq4KUQaZ9tgt-hW?tab=summary&timestamp=1343.0)
      - [**Strategic Content:** Cody proposed an article on market convergence, explaining how tools are expanding into each other's spaces.](https://fathom.video/share/gNQLwkdDszS3uiUyavq4KUQaZ9tgt-hW?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
          - [**Rationale:** This positions Prophecy as a thought leader and helps users understand the complex ecosystem.](https://fathom.video/share/gNQLwkdDszS3uiUyavq4KUQaZ9tgt-hW?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)

### Publishing Workflow & Logistics

  - [**First Article Status:**](https://fathom.video/share/gNQLwkdDszS3uiUyavq4KUQaZ9tgt-hW?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
      - [All feedback from Cody and Will is implemented.](https://fathom.video/share/gNQLwkdDszS3uiUyavq4KUQaZ9tgt-hW?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
      - [GrowthX will maintain a running log of reusable feedback to improve future articles.](https://fathom.video/share/gNQLwkdDszS3uiUyavq4KUQaZ9tgt-hW?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
  - [**Publishing Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/gNQLwkdDszS3uiUyavq4KUQaZ9tgt-hW?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)
      - [**Location:** Articles will be published under the `/guides` directory, not the blog.](https://fathom.video/share/gNQLwkdDszS3uiUyavq4KUQaZ9tgt-hW?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
      - [**Access:** Cody will fast-track GrowthX's Webflow access to the new domain, as the team cannot stage content.](https://fathom.video/share/gNQLwkdDszS3uiUyavq4KUQaZ9tgt-hW?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
      - [**Review:** Cody will streamline the final review process with Will and Raj.](https://fathom.video/share/gNQLwkdDszS3uiUyavq4KUQaZ9tgt-hW?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)
  - [**Image Generation:**](https://fathom.video/share/gNQLwkdDszS3uiUyavq4KUQaZ9tgt-hW?tab=summary&timestamp=933.0)
      - [**Decision:** Use AI-generated images to avoid designer bottlenecks.](https://fathom.video/share/gNQLwkdDszS3uiUyavq4KUQaZ9tgt-hW?tab=summary&timestamp=933.0)
      - [**Direction:** Align with Prophecy's brand (stylized "gems," simple agent icons).](https://fathom.video/share/gNQLwkdDszS3uiUyavq4KUQaZ9tgt-hW?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
      - [**Assets:** Cody will provide Figma files with design elements for reference.](https://fathom.video/share/gNQLwkdDszS3uiUyavq4KUQaZ9tgt-hW?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)

### Technical SEO & Site Health

  - [**Sitemap Issue:**](https://fathom.video/share/gNQLwkdDszS3uiUyavq4KUQaZ9tgt-hW?tab=summary&timestamp=1694.0)
      - [**Problem:** The XML sitemap contains invalid pages that do not 404.](https://fathom.video/share/gNQLwkdDszS3uiUyavq4KUQaZ9tgt-hW?tab=summary&timestamp=1694.0)
      - [**Impact:** These pages display a generic template (same image, old H1) and could negatively affect SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/gNQLwkdDszS3uiUyavq4KUQaZ9tgt-hW?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)
      - [**Context:** Likely a result of the recent site migration, possibly from sales requests to restore pages.](https://fathom.video/share/gNQLwkdDszS3uiUyavq4KUQaZ9tgt-hW?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
  - [**Site Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/gNQLwkdDszS3uiUyavq4KUQaZ9tgt-hW?tab=summary&timestamp=1883.0)
      - [Cody noted general confusion around the new site structure, with blog-style content appearing in the wrong sections.](https://fathom.video/share/gNQLwkdDszS3uiUyavq4KUQaZ9tgt-hW?tab=summary&timestamp=1883.0)
      - [GrowthX will continue to flag any technical or structural issues found.](https://fathom.video/share/gNQLwkdDszS3uiUyavq4KUQaZ9tgt-hW?tab=summary&timestamp=1902.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Cody:**](https://fathom.video/share/gNQLwkdDszS3uiUyavq4KUQaZ9tgt-hW?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)
      - [Fast-track Webflow access for GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/gNQLwkdDszS3uiUyavq4KUQaZ9tgt-hW?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
      - [Provide Figma files with brand assets.](https://fathom.video/share/gNQLwkdDszS3uiUyavq4KUQaZ9tgt-hW?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
      - [Document competitor landscape in a shared Google Doc.](https://fathom.video/share/gNQLwkdDszS3uiUyavq4KUQaZ9tgt-hW?tab=summary&timestamp=1258.0)
      - [Address the invalid sitemap pages internally.](https://fathom.video/share/gNQLwkdDszS3uiUyavq4KUQaZ9tgt-hW?tab=summary&timestamp=1776.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/gNQLwkdDszS3uiUyavq4KUQaZ9tgt-hW?tab=summary&timestamp=1212.0)
      - [Send sample AI-generated images based on brand assets.](https://fathom.video/share/gNQLwkdDszS3uiUyavq4KUQaZ9tgt-hW?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
      - [Review and get approval for the 9 proposed article topics.](https://fathom.video/share/gNQLwkdDszS3uiUyavq4KUQaZ9tgt-hW?tab=summary&timestamp=1212.0)
